title: Verify and update Vision/PRD gap statuses
description: Gap files vision.json and prd.json are stale (Apr 7). Many items marked 'partial' may now be 'implemented'. Check each partial/missing item against actual code: (1) STT/TTS agentic-voice dependency wiring, (2) wake word server-side pipeline, (3) cloud fallback OpenAI/Anthropic, (4) npx entrypoint, (5) external packages (agentic-store, agentic-voice, agentic-sense), (6) CDN fallback, (7) cross-device brain state, (8) HTTPS/LAN tunnel, (9) config hot-update. Update gap statuses to reflect reality.
